title: FT-Client - Pack
description: Pure client mods for my self-hosted server
body:
# 🧭 Fynn’s Client-Pack

**Minecraft Version:** `1.21.8`  

A fully optimized Fabric setup focused purely on **performance**, **stability**, and **responsiveness** — perfect for players who prefer the **vanilla look and feel** without unnecessary extras.  

Enjoy faster startup times, lower RAM usage, and smoother gameplay with the latest versions of **Sodium**, **Lithium**, **FerriteCore**, and **Krypton**.  
Small utility mods like **Controlling**, **Mod Menu**, and **Shulker Box Tooltip** ensure you still get essential quality-of-life features — without losing performance.

Perfect for players who just want a **clean, lightweight, and stable** client for survival or multiplayer servers.


<details>
